title: 1,000+ Tokens/Sec: Google Just Shattered the AI Speed Limit (DiffusionGemma)
summary: DiffusionGemma is Google DeepMind's text generation model that applies diffusion-based image generation techniques to LLM inference. It uses uniform state diffusion with bidirectional passes over a noise canvas to achieve generation speeds exceeding 1,000 tokens per second on H100 GPUs by shifting from memory-bound to compute-bound execution.
writeup: The video covers DiffusionGemma, Google DeepMind's text generation model that ports diffusion-based image generation techniques to LLM inference. It explains the core mechanism: uniform state diffusion with bidirectional passes over a noise canvas, which shifts execution from memory-bound to compute-bound and yields generation speeds exceeding 1,000 tokens per second on H100 GPUs. The significance lies in treating decoding as iterative refinement of a noise canvas rather than sequential token-by-token prediction, a departure from standard autoregressive inference.
